description_long: This is a mid-century modern style wooden sideboard or credenza, featuring a rich walnut finish and clean, angular lines. The front face is divided into three main sections: a central double-door cabinet and a set of three drawers on the right, all with seamless, handle-less fronts for a minimalist look. The cabinet stands on four tapered legs, elevating it off the ground and giving it a light, airy appearance. The back panel is solid with two elongated cutouts, likely for cable management, suggesting it could also serve as a media console. The side panels are plain, showcasing the natural wood grain. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a smooth, hard surface and a matte to semi-gloss finish.
description: A walnut-finished, mid-century modern sideboard with a central cabinet, three drawers, and tapered legs. Its seamless, handle-less design and cable cutouts on the back suggest both storage and media use.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main features: a central double-door cabinet and three drawers on the right, all with a seamless, handle-less design.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a plain, flat wooden panel with visible wood grain and the tapered leg structure.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a solid back panel with two elongated cutouts, likely for cable management, and no visible doors or drawers.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain wooden panel and the leg structure.
